setPresets.label: Major triad spark
setPresets.story: Start from the clearest triadic silhouette and inspect how little data already suggests tonal identity.

setPresets.label: Dorian lantern
setPresets.story: A minor color with a bright sixth shows how small set moves can keep a stable center while changing atmosphere.

setPresets.label: Whole-tone drift
setPresets.story: Maximal evenness flattens hierarchy and makes the clock feel rotational rather than directional.

setPresets.label: Acoustic hinge
setPresets.story: The raised fourth and lowered seventh create a bridge between diatonic brightness and dominant pressure.

setPresets.label: Cluster pressure
setPresets.story: Dense adjacency stresses interval color and makes complement and inversion visibly more dramatic.

setPresets.label: Open fifth lattice
setPresets.story: Wide interval spacing keeps the set sparse but still structurally legible under transposition and inversion.

keyPresets.label: C major hub
keyPresets.story: A neutral starting orbit for checking diatonic triads and functional balance.

keyPresets.label: G major lift
keyPresets.story: A sharp-side major key that still stays visually light and easy to scan.

keyPresets.label: D major engine
keyPresets.story: Dominant weight becomes obvious when the second and leading tone keep pushing upward.

keyPresets.label: A minor gravity
keyPresets.story: The aeolian baseline keeps the same pitch resources as C major but redistributes tonal pull.

keyPresets.label: E minor glass
keyPresets.story: Relative minor color with a darker center and familiar dominant behavior.

keyPresets.label: Bb minor fog
keyPresets.story: Flat-side minor keys make spelling and triad labeling visibly more charged.

chordPresets.label: C major anchor
chordPresets.story: Triadic stability in the clearest key context.

chordPresets.label: A minor hinge
chordPresets.story: The relative minor keeps shared material while shifting function.

chordPresets.label: Leading-tone fracture
chordPresets.story: Diminished sonority shows the unstable edge of the key orbit.

chordPresets.label: F major window
chordPresets.story: Subdominant color widens the field without leaving the key.

chordPresets.label: D minor film cue
chordPresets.story: A minor diatonic center that still reads strongly inside a larger tonal frame.

chordPresets.label: Ab augmented flare
chordPresets.story: Augmented symmetry is useful precisely because it breaks ordinary key belonging.

progressionPresets.label: Bright return
progressionPresets.story: I–V–vi–IV keeps pop-forward common tones while rotating the bass through a wide emotional arc.

progressionPresets.label: Dominant lantern
progressionPresets.story: ii–V–I–vi shows functional pull before the deceptive turn softens the landing.

progressionPresets.label: Aeolian walk
progressionPresets.story: i–VI–III–VII keeps the mode natural and lets shared tones do most of the connective work.

progressionPresets.label: Minor ascent
progressionPresets.story: i–iv–v–ii keeps the center dark but creates a strong forward contour through upper voices.

comparePresets.label: Major to minor
comparePresets.story: Lowering one scale degree changes the story while keeping two tones fixed.

comparePresets.label: Whole-tone vs diminished
comparePresets.story: Two highly regular sets can feel radically different once overlap and transpositional closure are exposed.

comparePresets.label: Acoustic vs diatonic
comparePresets.story: A raised fourth and lowered seventh transform the same tonic into a different gravitational field.

comparePresets.label: Cluster vs lattice
comparePresets.story: Density and spacing become measurable once overlap, union, and transposition are shown together.

fretPresets.label: Open C gravity
fretPresets.story: A familiar six-string voicing is the baseline for comparing new tunings and span limits.

fretPresets.label: Mandolin close voicing
fretPresets.story: A compact four-string layout shows the generic renderer is not tied to guitar-shaped assumptions.

fretPresets.label: Bass pedal frame
fretPresets.story: Lower register tunings make the same pitch-class logic feel more architectural.

fretPresets.label: Violin-shell harmony
fretPresets.story: Fourths and fifths reveal how little of the renderer is really instrument-specific.

fretPresets.label: Seven-string shadow
fretPresets.story: An extended tuning proves the public fret API can scale beyond six strings without changing concepts.
